CVE-2023-51798.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.N113007-g8d24a28d06 all ...
CVE-2023-51798.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.N113007-g8d24a28d06 allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via a floating point exception (FPE) error at libavfilter/vf_minterpolate.c:1078:60 in interpolate.
CVE-2023-51798.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2023-51793.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.N113007-g8d24a28d06 all ...
CVE-2023-51793.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.N113007-g8d24a28d06 allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via the libavutil/imgutils.c:353:9 in image_copy_plane.
CVE-2023-51793.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2023-6601.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS demuxer. This vulnerability allo ...
CVE-2023-6601.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS demuxer. This vulnerability allows bypassing unsafe file extension checks and triggering arbitrary demuxers via base64-encoded data URIs appended with specific file extensions.

CVE-2023-6602.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's TTY Demuxer. This vulnerability allo ...
CVE-2023-6602.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's TTY Demuxer. This vulnerability allows possible data exfiltration via improper parsing of non-TTY-compliant input files in HLS playlists.

CVE-2023-6605.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's DASH playlist support. This vulnerab ...
CVE-2023-6605.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's DASH playlist support. This vulnerability allows arbitrary HTTP GET requests to be made on behalf of the machine running FFmpeg via a crafted DASH playlist containing malicious URLs.

CVE-2023-51794.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.N113007-g8d24a28d06 all ...
CVE-2023-51794.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.N113007-g8d24a28d06 allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via the libavfilter/af_stereowiden.c:120:69.
CVE-2023-51794.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2023-49502.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.n6.1-3-g466799d4f5 allo ...
CVE-2023-49502.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Ffmpeg v.n6.1-3-g466799d4f5 allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via the ff_bwdif_filter_intra_c function in the libavfilter/bwdifdsp.c:125:5 component.
CVE-2023-49502.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2023-6604.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg. This vulnerability allows unexpected  ...
CVE-2023-6604.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg. This vulnerability allows unexpected additional CPU load and storage consumption, potentially leading to degraded performance or denial of service via the demuxing of arbitrary data as XBIN-formatted data without proper format validation.

CVE-2023-6603.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS playlist parsing. This vulnerabi ...
CVE-2023-6603.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS playlist parsing. This vulnerability allows a denial of service via a maliciously crafted HLS playlist that triggers a null pointer dereference during initialization.

CVE-2023-50010.title: FFmpeg v.n6.1-3-g466799d4f5 allows a buffer over-read at ff_gradf ...
CVE-2023-50010.description: FFmpeg v.n6.1-3-g466799d4f5 allows a buffer over-read at ff_gradfun_blur_line_movdqa_sse2, as demonstrated by a call to the set_encoder_id function in /fftools/ffmpeg_enc.c component.
CVE-2023-50010.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-3341.title: A null pointer dereference issue was discovered in 'FFmpeg' in de ...
CVE-2022-3341.description: A null pointer dereference issue was discovered in 'FFmpeg' in decode_main_header() function of libavformat/nutdec.c file. The flaw occurs because the function lacks check of the return value of avformat_new_stream() and triggers the null pointer dereference error, causing an application to crash.
CVE-2022-3341.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-3965.title: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in ffmpeg. Th ...
CVE-2022-3965.description: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in ffmpeg. This vulnerability affects the function smc_encode_stream of the file libavcodec/smcenc.c of the component QuickTime Graphics Video Encoder. The manipulation of the argument y_size leads to out-of-bounds read. The attack can be initiated remotely. The name of the patch is 13c13109759090b7f7182480d075e13b36ed8edd. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-213544.

CVE-2022-48434.title: libavcodec/pthread_frame.c in FFmpeg before 5.1.2, as used in VLC ...
CVE-2022-48434.description: libavcodec/pthread_frame.c in FFmpeg before 5.1.2, as used in VLC and other products, leaves stale hwaccel state in worker threads, which allows attackers to trigger a use-after-free and execute arbitrary code in some circumstances (e.g., hardware re-initialization upon a mid-video SPS change when Direct3D11 is used).
CVE-2022-48434.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-4907.title: Uninitialized Use in FFmpeg in Google Chrome prior to 108.0.5359. ...
CVE-2022-4907.description: Uninitialized Use in FFmpeg in Google Chrome prior to 108.0.5359.71 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

CVE-2022-3109.title: An issue was discovered in the FFmpeg package, where vp3_decode_f ...
CVE-2022-3109.description: An issue was discovered in the FFmpeg package, where vp3_decode_frame in libavcodec/vp3.c lacks check of the return value of av_malloc() and will cause a null pointer dereference, impacting availability.
CVE-2022-3109.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-3964.title: A vulnerability classified as problematic has been found in ffmpe ...
CVE-2022-3964.description: A vulnerability classified as problematic has been found in ffmpeg. This affects an unknown part of the file libavcodec/rpzaenc.c of the component QuickTime RPZA Video Encoder. The manipulation of the argument y_size leads to out-of-bounds read. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The name of the patch is 92f9b28ed84a77138105475beba16c146bdaf984. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-213543.

CVE-2025-0518.title: Unchecked Return Value, Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in FFmpe ...
CVE-2025-0518.description:
Unchecked Return Value, Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in FFmpeg allows Read Sensitive Constants Within an Executable. This vulnerability is associated with program files  https://github.Com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/blob/master/libavfilter/af_pan.C .

This issue affects FFmpeg: 7.1.

Issue was fixed:  https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/b5b6391d64807578ab872dc58fb8aa621dcfc38a

 https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/b5b6391d64807578ab872dc58fb8aa621dcfc38a This issue was discovered by: Simcha Kosman
CVE-2025-0518.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2025-7700.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg’s ALS audio decoder, where it does not ...
CVE-2025-7700.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg’s ALS audio decoder, where it does not properly check for memory allocation failures. This can cause the application to crash when processing certain malformed audio files. While it does not lead to data theft or system control, it can be used to disrupt services and cause a denial of service.

CVE-2025-1594.title: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in F ...
CVE-2025-1594.description: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in FFmpeg up to 7.1. This affects the function ff_aac_search_for_tns of the file libavcodec/aacenc_tns.c of the component AAC Encoder. The manipulation leads to stack-based buffer overflow. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
CVE-2025-1594.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-35366.title: FFmpeg n6.1.1 is Integer Overflow. The vulnerability exists in th ...
CVE-2024-35366.description: FFmpeg n6.1.1 is Integer Overflow. The vulnerability exists in the parse_options function of sbgdec.c within the libavformat module. When parsing certain options, the software does not adequately validate the input. This allows for negative duration values to be accepted without proper bounds checking.
CVE-2024-35366.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-7055.title: A vulnerability was found in FFmpeg up to 7.0.1. It has been clas ...
CVE-2024-7055.description: A vulnerability was found in FFmpeg up to 7.0.1. It has been classified as critical. This affects the function pnm_decode_frame in the library /libavcodec/pnmdec.c. The manipulation leads to heap-based buffer overflow. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. Upgrading to version 7.0.2 is able to address this issue. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-273651.
CVE-2024-7055.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-36616.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-35365.title: FFmpeg version n6.1.1 has a double-free vulnerability in the ffto ...
CVE-2024-35365.description: FFmpeg version n6.1.1 has a double-free vulnerability in the fftools/ffmpeg_mux_init.c component of FFmpeg, specifically within the new_stream_audio function.
CVE-2024-35365.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-35366.title: FFmpeg n6.1.1 is Integer Overflow. The vulnerability exists in th ...
CVE-2024-35366.description: FFmpeg n6.1.1 is Integer Overflow. The vulnerability exists in the parse_options function of sbgdec.c within the libavformat module. When parsing certain options, the software does not adequately validate the input. This allows for negative duration values to be accepted without proper bounds checking.
CVE-2024-35366.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-36613.title: FFmpeg n6.1.1 has a vulnerability in the DXA demuxer of the libav ...
CVE-2024-36613.description: FFmpeg n6.1.1 has a vulnerability in the DXA demuxer of the libavformat library allowing for an integer overflow, potentially resulting in a denial-of-service (DoS) condition or other undefined behavior.
CVE-2024-36613.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-7055.title: A vulnerability was found in FFmpeg up to 7.0.1. It has been clas ...
CVE-2024-7055.description: A vulnerability was found in FFmpeg up to 7.0.1. It has been classified as critical. This affects the function pnm_decode_frame in the library /libavcodec/pnmdec.c. The manipulation leads to heap-based buffer overflow. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. Upgrading to version 7.0.2 is able to address this issue. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-273651.
CVE-2024-7055.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2023-6601.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS demuxer. This vulnerability allo ...
CVE-2023-6601.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS demuxer. This vulnerability allows bypassing unsafe file extension checks and triggering arbitrary demuxers via base64-encoded data URIs appended with specific file extensions.

CVE-2023-6602.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's TTY Demuxer. This vulnerability allo ...
CVE-2023-6602.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's TTY Demuxer. This vulnerability allows possible data exfiltration via improper parsing of non-TTY-compliant input files in HLS playlists.

CVE-2023-6605.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's DASH playlist support. This vulnerab ...
CVE-2023-6605.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's DASH playlist support. This vulnerability allows arbitrary HTTP GET requests to be made on behalf of the machine running FFmpeg via a crafted DASH playlist containing malicious URLs.

CVE-2023-6604.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg. This vulnerability allows unexpected  ...
CVE-2023-6604.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg. This vulnerability allows unexpected additional CPU load and storage consumption, potentially leading to degraded performance or denial of service via the demuxing of arbitrary data as XBIN-formatted data without proper format validation.

CVE-2023-6603.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS playlist parsing. This vulnerabi ...
CVE-2023-6603.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg's HLS playlist parsing. This vulnerability allows a denial of service via a maliciously crafted HLS playlist that triggers a null pointer dereference during initialization.

CVE-2023-50010.title: FFmpeg v.n6.1-3-g466799d4f5 allows a buffer over-read at ff_gradf ...
CVE-2023-50010.description: FFmpeg v.n6.1-3-g466799d4f5 allows a buffer over-read at ff_gradfun_blur_line_movdqa_sse2, as demonstrated by a call to the set_encoder_id function in /fftools/ffmpeg_enc.c component.
CVE-2023-50010.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-3341.title: A null pointer dereference issue was discovered in 'FFmpeg' in de ...
CVE-2022-3341.description: A null pointer dereference issue was discovered in 'FFmpeg' in decode_main_header() function of libavformat/nutdec.c file. The flaw occurs because the function lacks check of the return value of avformat_new_stream() and triggers the null pointer dereference error, causing an application to crash.
CVE-2022-3341.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-3965.title: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in ffmpeg. Th ...
CVE-2022-3965.description: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in ffmpeg. This vulnerability affects the function smc_encode_stream of the file libavcodec/smcenc.c of the component QuickTime Graphics Video Encoder. The manipulation of the argument y_size leads to out-of-bounds read. The attack can be initiated remotely. The name of the patch is 13c13109759090b7f7182480d075e13b36ed8edd. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-213544.

CVE-2022-48434.title: libavcodec/pthread_frame.c in FFmpeg before 5.1.2, as used in VLC ...
CVE-2022-48434.description: libavcodec/pthread_frame.c in FFmpeg before 5.1.2, as used in VLC and other products, leaves stale hwaccel state in worker threads, which allows attackers to trigger a use-after-free and execute arbitrary code in some circumstances (e.g., hardware re-initialization upon a mid-video SPS change when Direct3D11 is used).
CVE-2022-48434.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-4907.title: Uninitialized Use in FFmpeg in Google Chrome prior to 108.0.5359. ...
CVE-2022-4907.description: Uninitialized Use in FFmpeg in Google Chrome prior to 108.0.5359.71 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

CVE-2022-3109.title: An issue was discovered in the FFmpeg package, where vp3_decode_f ...
CVE-2022-3109.description: An issue was discovered in the FFmpeg package, where vp3_decode_frame in libavcodec/vp3.c lacks check of the return value of av_malloc() and will cause a null pointer dereference, impacting availability.
CVE-2022-3109.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-3964.title: A vulnerability classified as problematic has been found in ffmpe ...
CVE-2022-3964.description: A vulnerability classified as problematic has been found in ffmpeg. This affects an unknown part of the file libavcodec/rpzaenc.c of the component QuickTime RPZA Video Encoder. The manipulation of the argument y_size leads to out-of-bounds read. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The name of the patch is 92f9b28ed84a77138105475beba16c146bdaf984. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-213543.

CVE-2025-0518.title: Unchecked Return Value, Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in FFmpe ...
CVE-2025-0518.description:
Unchecked Return Value, Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in FFmpeg allows Read Sensitive Constants Within an Executable. This vulnerability is associated with program files  https://github.Com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/blob/master/libavfilter/af_pan.C .

This issue affects FFmpeg: 7.1.

Issue was fixed:  https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/b5b6391d64807578ab872dc58fb8aa621dcfc38a

 https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/b5b6391d64807578ab872dc58fb8aa621dcfc38a This issue was discovered by: Simcha Kosman
CVE-2025-0518.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2025-7700.title: A flaw was found in FFmpeg’s ALS audio decoder, where it does not ...
CVE-2025-7700.description: A flaw was found in FFmpeg’s ALS audio decoder, where it does not properly check for memory allocation failures. This can cause the application to crash when processing certain malformed audio files. While it does not lead to data theft or system control, it can be used to disrupt services and cause a denial of service.
